description: Persona routing ablation: mean pairwise character-trigram Jaccard distance between 10 persona outputs per sample. Baseline = same text for all personas.

methodology.no_routing_baseline: All 10 personas receive General Employee text

persona_texts.Kid: Uh oh! Something sneaky is happening on your internet (99.8% sure). It's like a stranger trying to open your front door. Tell a grown-up right away and don't click anything unusual!
persona_texts.Teenager: Heads up — looks like something sketchy is going on with your network (99.8% confidence). Someone might be trying to hack in. Disconnect from Wi-Fi and let someone know.
persona_texts.Housewife: Our system detected something unusual on your home internet (99.8% sure). Think of it like an alarm going off at your front door. Please restart your router and let your family know to avoid clicking strange links.
persona_texts.Cashier: Security alert on your work system (99.8% confident). Stop what you're doing and call your manager or IT support immediately. Don't enter any passwords until they say it's safe.
persona_texts.General Employee: A potential security threat was detected on your network (99.8% confidence). Please stop using sensitive systems, disconnect from the network if possible, and contact your IT helpdesk immediately.
persona_texts.Business Owner: Security threat detected (99.8% confidence). Your business data or operations may be at risk. Key signals: Init_Win_bytes_forward (increases risk), Average Packet Size (increases risk), Total Length of Fwd Packets (increases risk). Immediate action: isolate the affected device, contact your IT provider, and consider notifying customers if data may be involved.
persona_texts.Student: Attack detected (99.8% confidence). The strongest indicator was **Init_Win_bytes_forward** (SHAP=+0.0661), which suggests abnormal flow behaviour. Key features: Init_Win_bytes_forward (increases risk), Average Packet Size (increases risk), Total Length of Fwd Packets (increases risk). Learning tip: this pattern is consistent with volumetric or scanning attacks where flow statistics deviate significantly from baseline.
persona_texts.Executive / Manager: RISK ALERT — 99.8% confidence. A network intrusion attempt has been detected that may impact operations or data integrity. Recommended action: authorise your IT team to isolate the affected system immediately.

Key signals: Packet Length Std (increases risk), Average Packet Size (increases risk), Total Length of Fwd Packets (increases risk). Immediate action: isolate the affected device, contact your IT provider, and consider notifying customers if data may be involved.
persona_texts.Student: Attack detected (99.5% confidence). The strongest indicator was **Packet Length Std** (SHAP=+0.0577), which suggests abnormal flow behaviour. Key features: Packet Length Std (increases risk), Average Packet Size (increases risk), Total Length of Fwd Packets (increases risk). Learning tip: this pattern is consistent with volumetric or scanning attacks where flow statistics deviate significantly from baseline.
